PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Backend software engineer with 4 years of experience building REST APIs and
microservices. Skilled in Python, Java, Django, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes and
AWS, with a track record of shipping scalable services and improving deployment
reliability.

WORK EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer — Northgate Tech Ltd
Jan 2021 - Present
- Designed and built REST APIs and microservices in Python (Django, FastAPI)
  serving 2M+ daily requests.
- Containerised services with Docker and deployed to Kubernetes on AWS.
- Set up CI/CD pipelines with Git, cutting release time by 40%.

Backend Developer — BluePixel Software
Jun 2019 - Dec 2020
- Built PostgreSQL-backed services and Redis caching layers.
- Wrote automated tests and improved code coverage across the codebase.

EDUCATION
